items.title: Merging & Rebasing
items.description: Conflicts only happen during merge, rebase, cherry-pick or `git pull` with divergence.

items.title: Commits & Branches
items.description: The three-way merge needs the ancestor commit plus both branch tips to compute the conflict.

items.title: Git Workflows
items.description: Trunk-based workflows aim to keep branches short to minimize conflict surface; GitFlow accepts more conflicts in exchange for parallel work.

items.title: Pull Requests & Reviews
items.description: Most PR UIs refuse to merge until conflicts are resolved; resolving them is part of getting a PR landed.

items.title: Jupyter — Notebooks Best Practices
items.description: Notebook conflicts are a major friction point; strip outputs and use nbdime to avoid the worst.
